rulings.Case Title: DE GUZMAN VS JUDICIAL COUNCIL OF CALIF
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Ntc Of Hrg On Demurrer Of Defts The Judicial Coun-Cil Of California And Robert Wandruff To 2nd Amended Complt, Calendar Motion: Hearing, Calendar Motion: Demurrer
rulings.Rulings: TENTATIVE RULING: DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE CLAIM BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS - NO ATTEMPT TO PLEAD ESTOPPEL PER ORDER 8/10/01. DEMURRER TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION DEPRIVATION OF EQUAL PROTECTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. NO ALLEGATION AS TO HOW PLAINTIFF SIMILARLY SITUATED TO OTHERS. DEMURRER TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION DEFAMATION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFAMATORY STATEMENTS NOT PROPERLY ALLEGED. INFRINGEMENT OF LIBERTY INTERESTS SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND UNCLEAR WHAT IS BEING CLAIMED. DEMURRER TO 5TH & 6TH CAUSES OF ACTION SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (NR)
